/CAL:MOTION TO RECALL SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/CTORD:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS RECALLED,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/X:COURT IMPOSESA CURFEW OF 5PM TO 8AM,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:04-28-22 PRETRIAL CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:PRETRIAL/X:DEFENSE'S ORAL REQUEST MODIFY HOME DETENTION TO CURFEW ISGRANTED/X:THE PEOPLE DID NOT OBJECT TO THE REQUEST/CTORD: HOME DETENTIONIS MODIFIED TO CURFEW CONDITION,  HOME DETENTION IS DELETED, CURFEW HOURS FROM 7PM TO 7AM/CONTD: FURTHER PRETRIAL 04-28-22/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/MISDRED1:4/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST& CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:THIS IS A DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:DEJ STATUS/DAWF/SA1:TYNYCHBEK SATYBALDYEV/SAORD/

/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE WITH A CURFEW BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 10PM AND 6AM AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/LD:08-12-20/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-12-20/987,2/X:THE PEOPLE FILED MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE PEOPLE FILED EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE COURT SIGNED ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:PEOPLE MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS GRANTED/NB/CONTD:BAIL REVIEW ON 07-08-20 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING 07-15-20/TE:2 HOURS/DOP/
